resources.string: Choose how long each clip is, the gap between, and how many to record.
When recording finishes, your clips combine into a single video — ready to share.
Rova uses your camera to record video. Without it, the app can\'t work.
Records sound alongside your video. Skip and sessions will be video-only — no audio.
You can change this any time in Settings.
A live notification lets you stop or check a recording without opening the app — even with the screen off.
Three clips combine into one video file
Ongoing notification while a recording session is active or merging.
One-shot notification when a recorded session is ready in the Library.
View this recording in the Library
Not enough storage to record. Free up space and try again.
Camera failed to start. Please restart recording.
Stopped — required permission revoked. Re-grant in Settings.
Stopped — device storage low. Free up space.
Stopped — device overheated. Let it cool down.
Automatically record between two times each day.
At the start time Rova shows a notification — tap it once to begin recording. Stopping is automatic.
Turn on notifications so Rova can prompt you when the window opens.
Allow exact alarms for accurate start/stop times.
Your recording window is open — tap to start.
Prompts when your daily recording window opens.
Stopped — recording state could not be saved. Will recover on next launch.
Recording stopped — finishing will be offered when you reopen Rova
Recording finished but state save failed — will reconcile on next launch.
Records clips, rotates with your device
Every clip saved as portrait + landscape (2× storage)
Front + rear cameras in one video
Next clip will run for %1$d s
Next clip will run for 1 m
Next clip will run for %1$d m
The camera connection was lost during recording.
Open Rova on screen before starting. Android blocks camera launches from the background.
Cannot start recording — Android requires the app to be in the foreground.
Recording could not start. Please try again.
Merge failed. Open Library to recover.
Save folder unavailable. Recording kept — pick a new location in Settings.
Recording not ready to share yet
No app available to share videos
Settings not available for this recording
Editor coming in a future release
Your merged sessions will appear here once you complete a recording.
Editor coming in a future release
Light, dark, or match your system setting.
Wait time before the next clip.
Stops the screen from dimming while you frame a shot.
Show the framing grid and focus brackets over the viewfinder.
Play short beeps so you can hear when capture starts and stops.
Use a short vibration to confirm starts and stops.
Manage Rova\'s notification channels in Android settings.
Notification settings not available on this device
That folder can\'t be used for saving. Pick another.
Off. Recordings stay until you delete them yourself.
Removes preview thumbnails and temporary files.
Required so recordings keep going in the background.
Rova is already exempt from battery optimization. Recordings will keep going in the background. Open battery settings to review or change this.
Rova needs to be exempt from battery optimization so recordings keep going in the background. Without this, your device may stop the recording mid-session.
Battery settings not available on this device
Open the policy in your browser.
Records until you stop, not selected
Rova can\'t record without camera access. Grant the permission in App Settings to continue.
Rova uses exact alarms to time recording clips. Without it, clips won\'t start or stop on schedule.
Free up space, then try again.
This session will record video only. You can grant microphone access in Settings and try again.
Enable notifications to see when recording starts, stops, or finishes merging — even with the screen off.
Notifications are how Rova tells you what\'s happening while you\'re not in the app — recording started, clip merged, session finished. Without them, you\'ll need to open the app to check progress.
Android may kill Rova in the background. Disable battery optimization for reliable long sessions.

Android\'s battery optimizer can pause background apps to save power. If Rova is paused mid-recording, the session may stop early or skip clips. Exempting Rova keeps the foreground service alive for the full session.
Turning off battery saver gives Rova full CPU/IO for the session.
Battery saver caps CPU frequency and background I/O. Rova may drop frames or fall behind on encoding, which can corrupt clip boundaries on long sessions.
Device very hot — recording may stop
Free space and retry, or keep the raw clips for later.
The custom save folder is no longer accessible. Open Settings and choose a new save location.
Camera in use by another app
Stop now to let it cool.
Another app is using the camera.
Move to shade or a cooler room.
Remove the case while the device cools.
Let the device rest 5 minutes before recording again.
Your last session ended before the clips could merge. The recovered clips stay on your device until you choose Discard recording. This action is permanent.
Your device\'s battery management stopped the recording before the clips could merge. The recovered clips stay on your device until you choose Discard recording. This action is permanent.
The app was force-stopped before the last session\'s clips could merge. The recovered clips stay on your device until you choose Discard recording. This action is permanent.
Rova needs Camera and Microphone permissions to record videos, and Storage access to save them.
Recording not ready to share yet
No app available to share videos
Save current settings as a preset
You already have a preset with this name
Recordings you move to the vault, or new recordings made while \"Hide new recordings in vault\" is on, appear here.
New recordings stay in Rova and are hidden from the gallery. They require your device screen lock to open here. Files are not encrypted in this version.
Use your screen lock to view hidden recordings
Set a device screen lock to protect the vault. Recordings are still hidden from the gallery, but the in-app lock is off.
Sharing or exporting copies this recording out of the vault. The copy is no longer hidden.
This permanently deletes the recording. It is not in your gallery and cannot be recovered.
Your background recordings will appear here.
Try a different name or date.
